summary_text: {"risk":"MEDIUM","approve":false,"findings":["No code diff, test artifacts, or logs were supplied for the auth-stale CTA, /happy/auth gateway, safe returnTo restoration, token persistence changes, or Claude kernel restoration, so the review cannot confirm redirect sanitization or session binding behavior.","Issue states only local verification ran; the manual Safari/PWA smoke checks called out as residual risk are still outstanding, leaving key client surfaces unverified.","The shared auth token persistence and safe returnTo work both affect cross-surface session reuse, but no threat model update or regression proof was provided to show replay/redirect defenses remain intact."],"recommendation":"Share the actual code references plus regression evidence for the auth-stale recovery work and complete the Safari/PWA smoke checks, documenting returnTo sanitization and shared token persistence before requesting sign-off.","rationale":"Without implementation artifacts or the promised Safari/PWA validation, the team cannot certify that the auth-stale recovery changes are complete or that they preserve redirect and session integrity, so the request should not be approved yet."}
